name_en: M83691 Puppy! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced toys. The Monogram canvas is accented with a puppy image and Epi calfskin appliqué, adding a colorful and playful touch to everyday looks.
name_cn:
M83691 Puppy! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced toys. The Monogram canvas is accented with a puppy image and Epi calfskin appliqué, adding a colorful and playful touch to everyday looks.
11 x 7 x 0.5 cm.
